question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 16.00% on 2026-03-27 for the Metaculus question "Will presidential impoundment authority be expanded by the Supreme Court or by law before November 3, 2026?"?
summary: Meta-prediction on whether CP for impoundment authority question will exceed 16.00% on March 27. CP has declined steadily from 36% to 16% over 5 weeks with no reversal. No SCOTUS merits case on impoundment is on the docket, no legislative progress on ICA repeal, and no breaking news catalysts. CP is exactly at the threshold, so staying flat resolves NO. While random forecaster volatility could push CP slightly above 16%, the strong downward trend and absence of catalysts make this unlikely. Estimate ~33% probability of YES.

factors.description: Strong, sustained downward trend in CP: 36% to 16% over 5 weeks with no reversal at any point
No SCOTUS impoundment case on merits docket for 2025-2026 term - the fundamental driver of CP decline
No legislative progress on ICA repeal bills (S.515, H.R.1180) beyond introduction
CP exactly at threshold (16.00%) - staying flat resolves NO, creating asymmetric downward bias
Random forecaster volatility: with 138 forecasters, new predictions could push CP slightly above threshold
Rate of decline slowing (14pp then 1pp drop), suggesting possible stabilization near current level
No breaking impoundment news in last 72 hours that would trigger forecaster updates upward

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.33 (33% probability YES)**

Key reasoning:
- The CP has been declining consistently from 36% → 16% over 5 weeks with zero reversals
- No SCOTUS merits case on impoundment is scheduled, and no ICA repeal legislation has progressed
- The CP sits exactly at the 16.00% threshold — staying flat or declining further resolves NO
- The ~33% YES probability accounts for random forecaster volatility that could push CP slightly above the boundary, but the strong downward momentum and lack of catalysts make this the less likely outcome

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/38166) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-03-27 04:56:09 is higher than 16.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 16.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-03-27 04:56:09, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
